ddls:
CREATE TABLE "address_blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address block */,
  "address_block_cidr" TEXT /* CIDR notation of the address block */,
  "address_range" TEXT /* Range of addresses in the block */,
  "number_of_addresses" INTEGER /* Number of addresses in the block */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the address block (e.g., software, host, global Internet) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the address block (e.g., unspecified address, loopback address, IPv4 mapped addresses) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the block was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the block was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the block (e.g., active, reserved, discarded) */,
  "block_owner" TEXT /* Owner or department responsible for the address block */,
  "block_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the address block */,
  "block_type" TEXT /* Type of the address block (e.g., static, dynamic) */,
  "last_assigned_at" TEXT /* Last time an address was assigned from this block */,
  "last_reserved_at" TEXT /* Last time a reservation was made in this block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address assignment */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address block the assignment belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Specific IPv6 address assigned */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the address is assigned to */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the address was assigned */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the assignment expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the assignment (e.g., active, expired, reserved) */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assignment */,
  "assigned_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who assigned the address */,
  "reservation_expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reservation expires */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of the assignment (e.g., static, dynamic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_assignments_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_assignments_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES address_blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_assignments_assigned_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., router, server, workstation) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the device was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the device was last updated */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "device_ip_addresses" TEXT /* List of all IPv6 addresses assigned to the device */,
  "device_owner" TEXT /* Owner or department responsible for the device */,
  "device_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, network engineer, auditor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., create, update, delete, assign, revoke) */,
  "action_detail" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "action_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "object_id" TEXT /* ID of the object the action was performed on */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the object (e.g., address_block, address_assignment) */,
  "action_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the action */,
  "action_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_action_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
